title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: Jeff Su reviews NotebookLM's updated interface and features, including the three-column layout, Studio panel tools (Reports, Slide Decks, Infographics, Mind Maps, Data Tables, Video Overviews, Quiz, Flashcards, Audio Overviews), and workflows for converting raw sources into finished outputs. The video ranks tools by priority and shares prompt templates for practical use.
